description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious driveway leading to a detached garage. The main building has a gable roof with a smaller cross-gabled section, and the exterior is clad in light-colored brick or stone. The property includes a landscaped front yard with a row of evenly spaced trees along the driveway and a larger tree in the rear corner. The entrance is marked by a paved walkway and a small porch area, while the backyard is partially enclosed and open for recreational use. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear for ample natural light.
description: A single-story, light-brick bungalow with a gable roof, detached garage, landscaped yard, and symmetrical front windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the driveway, detached garage, main entrance, and a row of trees lining the driveway.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side and rear of the bungalow, showing the full row of trees, the backyard, and the boundary wall.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the rear and opposite side of the bungalow, with the large tree in the back corner and the open backyard area.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the front entrance, driveway, garage, and the small porch area, with the row of trees visible to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
